goal: Model liquidator payoff across collateral ratio, position size, collateral mix, and gas assumptions.
minimal_state: positions around liquidation thresholds including CR <= 1 and small/huge positions
attacker_actions: compute expected collateral received vs debt burned
assertions: liquidator has non-negative expected payoff for intended liquidatable positions
bad debt does not grow because liquidation is unprofitable or impossible
common_failures: ignoring special collateral classes or gas cost
notes: Derived from existing normalized Code4rena case reports and intended as a reusable validation scaffold, not a protocol-specific PoC.
